message:
fix: resolve dead_code warnings and update dependencies

- Add #[expect(dead_code)] to BUILD_TIMESTAMP and RUSTC_SEMVER in build_info
- Update toml 0.8 -> 0.9 and refresh all transitive deps via cargo update
- Pin rich_rust to =0.1.0 (0.1.1 has #![feature(let_chains)] incompatible with stable 1.88)
- Add #![allow(clippy::unused_async)] to lib.rs for stub async functions
- Fix unfulfilled #[expect(dead_code)] in cost_scanner.rs
- Create comprehensive multi-account daemon monitoring system beads (29 issues)

Multi-account daemon epic includes:
- Gemini provider implementation (5 tasks)
- Credential file watcher daemon (5 tasks)
- Multi-account storage layer (4 tasks)
- Account switching detection (3 tasks)
- Aggregated usage CLI commands (6 tasks)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
